title: There is no record when the automation running
excerpt: I’ve noticed that automations created by me aren’t being recorded in the running history when they are triggered. While the automation itself works as expected, the lack of an entry in the running history makes it diffic…

posts.author: Jit02 (Hello World)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve noticed that automations created by me aren’t being recorded in the running history when they are triggered. While the automation itself works as expected, the lack of an entry in the running history makes it difficult to track and verify whether the automation is functioning properly. Could someone please assist me in resolving this issue?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
I recommend that you reach out to monday support on this.

Jim - The Monday Man
Get Custom Apps, Integrations & Automations for monday
